## Summary
What part of the mod are you giving feedback on?

## Current Experience
Describe what feels too strong, too weak, confusing, or unfun.

## Suggested Change
What do you think should be adjusted?

## Extra Notes
You can include world difficulty, possession type, screenshots, or clips here.
